title: lonicera pyrenaica subsp. majoricensis
intro: Lonicera pyrenaica subsp. majoricensis, also known as the Majorcan honeysuckle, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Caprifoliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lonicera pyrenaica subsp. majoricensis include its ability to ease congestion, reduce fever, and soothe sore throats. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effectiveness.
